items.title: Bill of materials and git-diff
items.content_text: Last year, I was assigned to a dry-dock campaign, and tasked with developing structural remediation scopes in an FPSO. Early on in the process, I made a decision to keep the content of work scope (SOW) separate from its associated bill of materials...
